hero.headline: Uttaranchal University Online MBA in International Business: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with International Business specialisation from Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. NAAC A+, WES recognised, est. 2011. Rs 1,40,000 gross, Rs 98,000 net (semester) or Rs 94,000 net (one-time) after 30% Early Bird. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. Global Business Environment, Import Export Procedures, Cross Cultural Challenges, and Global Financial Markets in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: Uttaranchal University Online MBA International Business: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised. Rs 94,000 net (one-time) or Rs 98,000 net (semester) after 30% Early Bird on Rs 1,40,000 gross. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. Sem 3-4 covers Global Business Environment and Ethics, Import Export Procedures and Documentation, Cross Cultural Business Challenges, and Global Financial Markets and Instruments. Budget IB MBA with WES recognition for international credential evaluation.

about.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in International Business is offered by Uttaranchal University (UU), a private university established in 2011 in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. UU holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The degree is WES recognised, which adds practical value for the International Business specialisation since WES evaluation is often required for overseas employment and immigration.

The International Business specialisation covers Global Business Environment and Ethics, Import Export Procedures and Documentation, Cross Cultural Business Challenges, and Global Financial Markets and Instruments across Semesters 3 and 4. The Import Export Procedures subject is practically useful for professionals in trade, logistics, and export-oriented industries.

At Rs 94,000 net (one-time), this is among the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBAs with a dedicated IB track. The trade-off is limited global brand recognition. UU is not a brand that international employers will recognise. For India-based trade, export, and logistics professionals who need the credential and IB knowledge at minimum cost, UU International Business is a viable option.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Develop competitive strategy frameworks, industry analysis models, and corporate-level strategic planning skills.

sem3Subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Study procurement, logistics, inventory management, and end-to-end supply chain coordination.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Statement Analysis
sem3Subjects.description: Interpret balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements, and apply ratio analysis for decision-making.

sem3Subjects.name: Global Business Environment and Ethics
sem3Subjects.description: Study international trade theories, WTO frameworks, global regulatory environments, and ethical standards in cross-border business.

sem3Subjects.name: Import Export Procedures and Documentation
sem3Subjects.description: Cover customs documentation, EXIM policy, bill of lading, letter of credit, DGFT procedures, and trade compliance.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
sem4Subjects.description: Study business model creation, startup finance, venture capital, and entrepreneurial risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Corporate Governance
sem4Subjects.description: Examine board structures, regulatory compliance, SEBI guidelines, and ethical governance frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: Project Work
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied research project on an international business topic with data collection, analysis, and presentation.

sem4Subjects.name: Cross Cultural Business Challenges
sem4Subjects.description: Study cultural dimensions in business, managing diverse global teams, negotiation styles across cultures, and cross-border HR practices.

sem4Subjects.name: Global Financial Markets and Instruments
sem4Subjects.description: Study FOREX markets, international capital markets, derivative instruments, sovereign bonds, and cross-border investment flows.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Uttaranchal University Online MBA specialisations. See the main Uttaranchal University Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
International Business MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Export houses and trading companies, International logistics and freight forwarding, FMCG multinationals, IT services (global delivery), Banking (trade finance), Government trade promotion bodies

**Entry-level roles:** Export Executive, Trade Compliance Associate, International Business Development Executive, FOREX Analyst, Logistics Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Export Manager, International Business Manager, Trade Finance Manager, Global Supply Chain Manager, Country Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP International Business, Head of Global Operations, Director of Trade and Compliance, Chief Commercial Officer, Head of FOREX Treasury

**Typical hiring organisations:** Tata International, Mahindra Group, Adani Ports, Reliance Industries, DHL, Maersk, Kuehne+Nagel, HDFC Bank (Trade Finance), SBI (International Banking), ECGC, EXIM Bank, Godrej, ITC (International Division)

skills.body:
The International Business specialisation builds skills for trade, export, and global operations roles:

**Technical skills:**
- Import Export Procedures: customs documentation, EXIM policy application, bill of lading processing, letter of credit management, and DGFT compliance
- Global Financial Markets: FOREX trading concepts, international capital market instruments, sovereign bond analysis, and cross-border investment flow assessment
- Global Business Environment: WTO framework application, international trade regulation, and global competitive analysis
- Cross Cultural Management: Hofstede and Trompenaars cultural dimension models, global team management, and cross-border negotiation

**Applied skills:**
- Trade Compliance: export licensing, sanctions screening, anti-money laundering regulations, and customs classification for trade compliance roles
- International Strategy: market entry mode selection, joint venture structuring, and global expansion planning

**Soft skills:** Cross-cultural negotiation, managing global virtual teams, presenting international expansion proposals to leadership, and coordinating between headquarters and regional offices.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Uttaranchal University Online MBA International Business against peers:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU does not offer a dedicated International Business specialisation with the same subject depth. UU at Rs 94,000 provides four IB-specific subjects including Import Export Procedures. For trade and export careers, UU offers more relevant depth.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA International Business (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias offers International Business Management as a specialisation at a similar budget tier. Both are NAAC A+. UU offers dedicated Import Export Procedures and Global Financial Markets subjects. Fee difference is under Rs 8,000.

**vs Amity Online MBA International Business (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.4x the cost with NIRF #22, larger alumni network, and stronger brand with MNC employers. For international roles at multinationals, Amity carries more weight. UU delivers NAAC A+ at under Rs 1 lakh.

**vs LPU Online MBA International Business (Rs 1,61,000):** LPU offers NIRF #31, Coursera Plus, and stronger placement infrastructure. At 1.7x the cost, LPU is a more complete package.

**vs CU Online MBA (Rs 1,65,000):** CU is NIRF #19 with PwC co-teaching. At 1.75x the cost, CU offers substantially better rankings and industry integration.

**vs JIIT Online MBA (Rs 1,82,000):** JIIT offers mandatory internship and AI core. At nearly 2x the cost, JIIT suits those wanting structured industry exposure.

**vs DPU Online MBA (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is NIRF #41, NAAC A++. At 2x the cost, DPU offers higher accreditation and Pune's export-oriented industry connections.

fees.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in International Business has a gross fee of Rs 1,40,000. A 30% Early Bird discount reduces the net fee across all payment tracks.

**Track 1: One-Time Payment**
- Net fee: Rs 94,000 (includes Rs 4,000 additional concession over semester track)
- Single payment at admission

**Track 2: Annual Payment**
- Rs 47,000 x 2 years = Rs 94,000 net
- Same net cost as one-time payment

**Track 3: Semester Payment**
- Rs 24,500 x 4 semesters = Rs 98,000 net
- Costs Rs 4,000 more than one-time or annual tracks

**No-Cost EMI:**
- Rs 3,956/month directly through the university
- No interest charged. No processing fee.

**Included:** Exam fee of Rs 2,500 per semester is included in all quoted figures.
**Not applicable:** No separate application fee. No scholarships beyond the Early Bird discount. No bundled perks.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Uttaranchal University each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the International Business specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation, which is relevant for professionals seeking overseas employment or immigration. It is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Uttaranchal University Online MBA International Business students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Nikhil
items.liked: Import Export Procedures and Documentation was the most practical subject. Directly applicable to my work at an export house. The Rs 94,000 fee with NAAC A+ is strong value.
items.disliked: No international immersion, study tour, or exchange programme. The 'International Business' name does not come with any global exposure component.
items.body: I manage export documentation for a Dehradun-based herbal products exporter. The EXIM policy and customs documentation subjects gave me structured knowledge I was picking up piecemeal on the job. UU brand works in Uttarakhand industry. For export and trade roles in the region, this MBA is practical and affordable.

items.name: Swati
items.liked: Global Financial Markets subject covered FOREX and international capital market concepts well. WES recognition is a genuine benefit for the IB specialisation.
items.disliked: Brand recognition at MNCs in Delhi is very limited. For international roles at global companies, the UU name does not carry weight.
items.body: If you are targeting international business roles at Indian export houses, trading companies, or logistics firms, UU IB at Rs 94,000 is good value. If you want MNC international roles, you need a brand that global HR teams recognise. Amity or Manipal would be stronger for that. UU is for cost-conscious professionals in India-facing trade roles.

items.name: Deepak
items.liked: Cross Cultural Business Challenges was well-taught and relevant. No-cost EMI made the programme genuinely accessible.
items.disliked: The Early Bird window timing was not clearly communicated on the website. I had to call the admissions office to confirm I was eligible.
items.body: Solid credential for the fee. The WES recognition adds value if you plan to get your credentials evaluated internationally. Do not expect the programme to open doors at global MNCs by brand name alone. For India-based trade, logistics, and export professionals, UU International Business at under Rs 1 lakh is a practical investment.

faqs.question: Does UU Online MBA International Business include any international exposure component?
faqs.answer: No. The programme is fully online with no international study tour, exchange, or immersion component. International exposure is limited to the syllabus subjects covering global business, trade, and cross-cultural management.

faqs.question: What is the net fee for UU Online MBA International Business?
faqs.answer: The gross fee is Rs 1,40,000. After the 30% Early Bird discount, the net fee is Rs 94,000 (one-time or annual) or Rs 98,000 (semester track). The semester track costs Rs 4,000 more.

faqs.question: Is the degree WES recognised?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Uttaranchal University MBA is WES recognised. This is relevant for professionals seeking international credential evaluation for overseas employment or immigration purposes.

faqs.question: Is this MBA useful for export and trade careers?
faqs.answer: Yes. The dedicated Import Export Procedures and Documentation subject covers EXIM policy, customs documentation, bill of lading, letter of credit, and DGFT procedures. It is directly applicable to export houses, trading companies, and logistics firms.

faqs.question: How does UU IB compare to Amity IB on brand recognition?
faqs.answer: Amity (NIRF #22, Rs 2.25L) carries substantially stronger brand recognition with MNC employers and international HR teams. UU is NAAC A+ at Rs 94,000 but has limited brand recognition outside Uttarakhand and North India. For MNC international roles, Amity justifies the premium.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised online MBA in International Business at under Rs 1 lakh total fee.
You work in export, trade, or logistics and need import-export procedures and global business knowledge formalised with an MBA credential.
You want no-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month with exam fees included and no hidden charges.
consider: If MNC international roles require strong brand recognition, Amity (Rs 2.25L, NIRF #22) or CU (Rs 1.65L, NIRF #19) carry more weight.
If you want international study tours or exchange programmes, UU does not offer these. Consider on-campus MBA options with global immersion.
If you want the absolute cheapest MBA, IGNOU at Rs 66,000 is lower but does not offer a dedicated IB specialisation with the same subject depth.
